name: data-pipeline
label: Data Pipeline
description: Data engineering, ETL, analytics, or workflow orchestration project.
profile_description: Pipelines run on remote infrastructure. Local runs for development and smoke testing only.
run_context_additions: - Local runs are for development and smoke testing only — not production scale.
- Record for every production run: trigger, input dataset version, output location, row counts, runtime, and the config version + code SHA that produced it.

- Pre-scale gate: before any large paid or full-corpus run — (1) first-principles audit of the pipeline architecture, (2) a measured smoke test on a small sample, (3) explicit operator spend approval. Patches do not clear the gate; systemic soundness does.
- Cost acknowledgment required before any large-scale remote execution.
- Treat data mutations as irreversible — prefer append-only or versioned writes.
- Always test with a small sample before running at full scale.
workflow_notes: Design every pipeline step for idempotency — assume it may run more than once.
Log input and output record counts for every pipeline run in the project's declared progress doc (EVENTS.md index + NEXT_STEPS.md in the default scaffold).
Use the `overnight-loop` skill for backfill jobs or batch iterations — write the invariant file first.
Test with a small data sample before running at full scale.
Record pipeline run metadata (trigger, duration, row counts) in the action log.

Silent drops are defects: every filter/gate stage logs counts in, counts out, and discard reasons — and an artifact that cannot be traced back to its inputs, config version, and producing code is a defect too.

Config discipline (two surfaces): versioned input/artifact paths in ONE config module (env-overridable); behavioral tunables in ONE grouped constants module wired through argparse defaults, env flags resolved at call time. Classify before centralizing (move / env-flag / stays-coupled / stays-vendor / stays-frozen — record why the stays stay) and guard the convention with a build-failing tripwire.

Stage promotions are gated by a recorded measurement artifact — measured metrics plus an explicit verdict token plus the disconfirmation evidence checked — assertion alone never advances the next stage.
Ship behavior changes behind default-OFF flags recorded with their defaults; a green regression suite is a precondition, not a goal.
safety_notes: Data mutations may be irreversible — verify inputs and outputs before any destructive step.
Cost acknowledgment required before large-scale remote execution.
Keep credentials, connection strings, and API keys out of code and version control.
Never run a full-scale pipeline without a passing smoke test on sample data.
